title: festuca elatior var. minutiflora
intro: Festuca elatior var. minutiflora, also known as tall fescue, is a variety of the tall fescue plant, a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular treatment for wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Festuca elatior var. minutiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
